expected_behavior: Ontology suggestions remain draft until explicit promotion; search/profile/claim/action/audit integration remains green under tenant policy.
given: VS2 changes are applied over the accepted local VS1 ontology slice.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: VS1 report, zero auto-promotions/cross-tenant promotions, policy refs.
then: Ontology suggestions remain draft until explicit promotion; search/profile/claim/action/audit integration remains green under tenant policy.
verification_method: Run `make verify-vs1-ontology` plus cross-tenant ontology tests.
